outline.title: Systematic Theology
outline.summary: Welcome to Systematic Theology. This course explores the foundational doctrines of Christian faith including God, humanity, salvation, and eschatology. Learn a comprehensive systematic approach to understanding biblical theology and Christian doctrine.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Overview
outline.summary: Understand the major theological doctrines and how they relate to each other. This course provides a structured framework for understanding Christian theology and develops your ability to think systematically about biblical truth.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: What You'll Learn
outline.summary: Master the major doctrines of Christian faith. Understand God's nature and attributes. Learn about humanity, sin, salvation, and the church. Explore eschatology and God's plan for the future.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Structure
outline.summary: 10 comprehensive lessons covering Prolegomena, Theology Proper, Anthropology, Soteriology, Ecclesiology, and Eschatology. Includes theological analysis, biblical foundations, and practical implications of doctrine.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Ready to Begin?
outline.summary: Enroll now and develop a comprehensive understanding of Christian theology. Build a strong theological foundation that will deepen your faith and equip you for effective ministry and spiritual leadership.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed
